title: verbascum × ramigerum
intro: Verbascum × ramigerum, also known as the Biennial Mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus that is known for its impressive stature and striking appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Verbascum × ramigerum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
